title: US-Israeli War on Iran
summary: Joint US-Israeli military campaign (Operation Epic Fury / Operation Roaring Lion) launched Feb 28, 2026, targeting Iranian leadership, nuclear facilities, and military infrastructure. Supreme Leader Khamenei killed in opening strikes. Iran retaliating with missiles across Gulf states, threatening Strait of Hormuz closure. Over 1,000 killed in Iran. Nine countries now involved.
status: Active war — US/Israeli strikes ongoing, Iranian retaliation across Gulf

title: Russia–Ukraine War
summary: Now in its fifth year. Russia occupies 20% of Ukraine but front-line gains have slowed sharply — just 49 sq mi in February 2026. Ukraine counterattacking in the south, reclaiming 400 sq km since January. Energy infrastructure under relentless drone attack. Estimated 1M+ Russian and 250K+ Ukrainian military casualties.
status: Active — Russian gains slowing, Ukrainian southern counterattacks

title: Sudan Civil War
summary: Approaching third anniversary. SAF recaptured Khartoum; RSF controls most of Darfur and parts of Kordofan. Estimated 400,000+ dead, 11M+ displaced — world's worst displacement crisis. Drone warfare escalating on both sides with foreign-supplied UAVs.
status: Active — country split between SAF and RSF spheres of control

title: Myanmar Civil War
summary: Five years since the 2021 coup. Junta controls only 21-30% of territory; resistance forces hold 42-60%. Sham elections held Dec 2025–Jan 2026 in only 263 of 330 townships. Resistance advancing toward Mandalay. Nearly 4M internally displaced.
status: Active — junta controls <30% of territory, resistance gaining

title: South China Sea Tensions
summary: Persistent maritime friction between China and Philippines over disputed reefs. Philippines pushing Code of Conduct as 2026 ASEAN chair but experts say agreement unlikely this year. US holding 500+ military exercises with Philippines. Diplomatic talks resumed after year-long hiatus.
status: Tense — diplomatic re-engagement alongside continued maritime friction

title: Red Sea / Houthi Shipping Threat
summary: Houthis paused attacks in Nov 2025 following Gaza ceasefire, allowing tentative return of shipping to Suez Canal. Now threatening to resume operations in response to US-Israeli strikes on Iran. Container lines unlikely to return to Suez in 2026. 178 vessels attacked during 2024-2025 campaign.
status: Re-escalating — Houthis threatening renewed attacks due to Iran war
